calendar_note: Study days are weekdays only (Mon-Fri). Start: Mon 2 March. Exam: Thu 2 April.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.focus: Build vocabulary base, establish SRS habit, introduce conversation with heavy scaffolding

phases.name: Fluency
phases.focus: Increase speaking fluency, reduce scaffolding, introduce exam-format exercises

phases.name: Exam Prep
phases.focus: Full exam simulations, targeted weak-area practice, consolidation

days.title: Getting Started

activities.task: Learn 25 new words: greetings, personal info basics
Self-introduction practice with heavy scaffolding
Form filling: personal details registration form
Review any due cards

days.grammar_focus: Present tense of être and avoir

days.title: Family & People

activities.task: Learn 25 new words: family members, descriptions
Describe your family to the tutor
Letter writing: introduce yourself to a new neighbour
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Possessive adjectives (mon, ma, mes)

days.title: Daily Routine & Time

activities.task: Learn 25 new words: daily activities, time expressions
Describe your typical day
Form filling: appointment booking form
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Reflexive verbs (se lever, se coucher), telling time

days.title: Housing & Home

activities.task: Learn 25 new words: rooms, furniture, housing terms
Describe where you live
Letter writing: report a problem to your landlord
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Prepositions of place (dans, sur, sous, devant, derrière)

days.title: Shopping & Food

activities.task: Learn 25 new words: food items, shops, prices
Order food at a restaurant
Form filling: supermarket loyalty card application
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Partitive articles (du, de la, des, de l')

days.title: Health & Body

activities.task: Learn 25 new words: body parts, symptoms, doctor visit
Explain symptoms to a doctor
Letter writing: cancel a medical appointment
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Avoir mal a (body parts), negation (ne...pas, ne...plus)

days.title: Transport, Work & Admin

activities.task: Learn 25 new words: transport, workplace, post office
Ask for directions and buy a train ticket
Form filling: change of address at commune
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Imperative mood (tournez, allez, prenez)

days.title: Foundation Review & Past Tense

activities.task: Extended review of all due cards
Free conversation covering all topics, past tense intro
Mini mock: form filling + letter + image description

days.grammar_focus: Passe compose introduction (avoir + être verbs)

days.title: Past Tense Fluency

activities.task: Learn 15 new words: travel, holidays
Describe what you did last weekend
Talk about a past holiday
Image description: a street market scene
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Passe compose fluency (avoir + être verbs mixed)

days.title: Future Plans & Comparisons

activities.task: Learn 15 new words: plans, adjectives, comparisons
Discuss plans for the weekend and future goals
Compare your city to another
Role-play: book a hôtel room
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Future (aller + infinitif), comparatives (plus/moins/aussi...que)

days.title: Health Conversations

activities.task: Learn 15 new words: medical terms, pharmacy
Full doctor visit conversation
Role-play: at the pharmacy
Listening comprehension: phone message from doctor
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Devoir/pouvoir + infinitive, conditional politeness (je voudrais)

days.title: Administrative Tasks

activities.task: Learn 15 new words: documents, procedures, municipality
Request information at the commune
Role-play: at the post office
Listening comprehension: apartment rental ad
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Il faut + infinitive, question formation

days.title: Work & Education

activities.task: Learn 15 new words: office, meetings, school
Describe your professional experience
Role-play: parent-teacher meeting
Open discussion: work and daily life
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Depuis + present tense, pronouns en/y

days.title: Eating & Leisure

activities.task: Learn 15 new words: restaurant, hobbies, sports
Order a meal and discuss food preferences
Discuss hobbies and invite someone to an activity
Sequential image description: restaurant visit
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Jouer a/de, faire de, opinion expressions

days.title: Housing & Getting Around

activities.task: Learn 15 new words: repairs, neighbours, tickets, delays
Report a flat problem to building manager
Plan a journey and deal with a transport problem
Listening comprehension: directions to the post office
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Il y a / il manque, impersonal expressions

days.title: Weather & Swiss Life

activities.task: Learn 15 new words: weather, seasons, Swiss-specific
Discuss the weather and seasonal activities
Open discussion: life in Switzerland
Letter writing: invite a friend to a party
Review due cards

days.grammar_focus: Il fait/pleut/neige, all tenses review

days.title: Fluency Review & Half Mock

activities.task: Extended review session
Long free conversation mixing all topics and tenses
Half mock oral: self-intro + image description + role-play
Review progress metrics, identify weak areas for exam prep

days.grammar_focus: All grammar points reviewed under light pressure

days.title: Full Mock Exam 1 (Oral)

activities.task: Review due cards only
Complete oral exam simulation (40 min)
Analyse mock results, identify weak areas
Re-do weakest section from mock

days.grammar_focus: Exam conditions: all grammar under pressure

days.title: Written Mock 1 + Weak Areas

activities.task: Review due cards
Complete written exam simulation (60 min)
Targeted oral practice on weakest area from Mock 1

days.grammar_focus: Written expression, time management

days.title: Targeted Strengthening

activities.task: Review due cards
Intensive practice on weakest exam task types
Conversation at natural A2 speed, minimal scaffolding
Listening comprehension intensive (3 exercises)

days.grammar_focus: Based on mock feedback

days.title: Full Mock Exam 2 (Oral)

activities.task: Review due cards
Complete oral exam simulation (40 min)
Compare with Mock 1 results
Practice filler phrases and smooth transitions

days.grammar_focus: Confidence and fluency under exam conditions

days.title: Written Mock 2 + Final Polish

activities.task: Light review of flagged difficult words
Complete written exam simulation (60 min)
Quick run-through: self-intro + 1 image + 1 role-play

days.grammar_focus: Final written practice, time management

days.title: Day Before Exam

activities.task: Light review of flagged difficult words only
Light, confidence-building conversation
Quick self-introduction and image description (comfort zone)
Final progress review and exam day reminders

days.grammar_focus: No new material. Confidence and rest.
